title: Column Limit Enterprise Plan
excerpt:
Good afternoon monday community! 
What is the column limit for enterprise plans 50, 200, 300, 500? 
Thanks!

posts.author: JDAY (Jared Yousif)
posts.cookedHtml:
Good afternoon monday community!

What is the column limit for enterprise plans 50, 200, 300, 500?

Thanks!

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
On Enterprise there isn’t a limit currently. On Pro, there is a limit of 75 for newer accounts

image1150×520 52.6 KB

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com

posts.author: IzzyLu (Isabell Lu)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Clover_Gal, where did you find this image? We have found this article: The basics of columns – Support where it says “Note: There is a limit of 500 columns per board.”. We tested it and it was true that we were only able to create 500 columns, not one single more.

Thank you in advance!

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: This was on a CRM pricing page. I wonder if the limits are different by plan?
